examples: Make the eyes by using craft glue to affix sequins to buttons.
Affix brightly colored shapes to the wall above baby's changing table.
Clerk: The letter is a little bit heavier. Please affix another stamp.
Why not just write things on a blank piece of paper and affix a stamp to it?
That's why we have heard our chief executives affix it to everything from energy to housing and educational test scores.
